text:
Data Privacy & Protection (DPDP / GDPR):
Do you collect personal data from users?
Is explicit user consent obtained before data collection?
Can users request deletion of their data?
Is sensitive data encrypted at rest and in transit?
Do you store data within permitted jurisdictions (data localization)?
Is data anonymized or masked where possible?
Do you have a privacy policy available to users?
Is access to user data restricted based on roles?
Do you log access to sensitive data?
Do you regularly audit data storage practices?

Security & Infrastructure (ISO 27001 / OWASP):
Are APIs secured with authentication and authorization?
Is input validation implemented to prevent injection attacks?
Are secrets (API keys, tokens) securely stored?
Do you perform regular vulnerability scans?
Is HTTPS enforced across all endpoints?
Do you have firewall and intrusion detection systems?
Are backups taken and tested regularly?
Do you have role-based access control (RBAC)?
Are logs monitored for suspicious activity?
Is multi-factor authentication (MFA) enabled for admins?

AI / LLM Risk Management (OWASP LLM Top 10):
Are prompts validated to prevent prompt injection?
Do you filter harmful or unsafe model outputs?
Is there a mechanism to detect hallucinations?
Are outputs grounded using verified data sources?
Do you restrict model access to sensitive internal data?
Is user input sanitized before processing?
Do you log prompts and responses for auditing?
Are rate limits applied to prevent abuse?
Is model behavior tested under adversarial conditions?
Do you have fallback responses for uncertain outputs?
section: AI / LLM Risk Management (OWASP LLM Top 10)

text:
Logging & Monitoring (CERT-In / NIST):
Do you maintain logs of all system activities?
Are logs stored securely and retained for required duration?
Is there a real-time monitoring system for incidents?
Do you have an incident response plan?
Are alerts configured for unusual behavior?
Do you regularly review logs for anomalies?
Is there a system for reporting security incidents?
Are audit trails maintained for critical actions?
Do you track system performance metrics?
Are logs protected from unauthorized access?

Banking / Fintech Compliance (RBI Guidelines):
Do you comply with RBI cybersecurity guidelines?
Are financial transactions logged and monitored?
Do you implement fraud detection mechanisms?
Is user authentication strong (OTP, MFA)?
Are payment systems secured against breaches?
Do you follow KYC and AML requirements?
Is data encrypted during financial transactions?
Do you perform regular compliance audits?
Are third-party integrations vetted for security?
Do you maintain regulatory reporting records?

Governance & Risk Management (NIST / ISO):
Do you have a defined risk management framework?
Are risks identified and documented regularly?
Do you conduct periodic internal audits?
Is there a compliance officer or responsible role?
Do you maintain documentation of policies and procedures?
Are employees trained on security and compliance?
Do you have business continuity and disaster recovery plans?
Are third-party vendors assessed for compliance?
Do you review and update policies regularly?
Is there a mechanism for continuous improvement?
